scripts.dev:runtime: concurrently -k -n OPS,API,WA,SCHED,WEB -c cyan,blue,yellow,magenta,green --restart-tries 50 --restart-after 2000 "npm run svc:ops:dev" "npm run svc:api:dev" "npm run svc:wa:dev" "npm run scheduler:local" "vite --strictPort --port 5173 --host 127.0.0.1"
scripts.db:dev: echo "Using shared Supabase database (no local Postgres container)."
scripts.db:dev:stop: echo "No local database container to stop."
scripts.resync:dev: npm run db:migrate:dev && npm run seed:dev
scripts.svc:wa:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (-not $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET) { $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET = 'autolinks-dev-local-webhook-secret' }; npm --prefix services/whatsapp-baileys run dev"
scripts.svc:tg:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (-not $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET) { $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET = ([guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N') + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N')) }; npm --prefix services/telegram-telegraph run dev"
scripts.svc:shopee:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (-not $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET) { $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET = ([guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N') + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N')) }; npm --prefix services/shopee-affiliate run dev"
scripts.svc:meli:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (-not $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET) { $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET = ([guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N') + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N')) }; npm --prefix services/mercadolivre-rpa run dev"
scripts.svc:amazon:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (-not $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET) { $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET = ([guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N') + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N')) }; npm --prefix services/amazon-affiliate run dev"
scripts.system:bootstrap: concurrently -k -n OPS,WEB -c cyan,green --restart-tries 50 --restart-after 2000 "npm run svc:ops:dev" "npm run preview:safe"
scripts.svc:api:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (-not $env:JWT_SECRET) { $env:JWT_SECRET = ([guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N') + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N')) }; if (-not $env:SERVICE_TOKEN) { $env:SERVICE_TOKEN = ([guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N') + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N')) }; if (-not $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET) { $env:WEBHOOK_SECRET = 'autolinks-dev-local-webhook-secret' }; if (-not $env:CORS_ORIGIN) { $env:CORS_ORIGIN='http://127.0.0.1:5173' }; if (-not $env:OPS_CONTROL_URL) { $env:OPS_CONTROL_URL='http://127.0.0.1:3115' }; if (-not $env:ADMIN_EMAIL) { $env:ADMIN_EMAIL='admin@localhost.local' }; if (-not $env:ADMIN_PASSWORD) { $env:ADMIN_PASSWORD = [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N') }; if (-not $env:WHATSAPP_MICROSERVICE_URL) { $env:WHATSAPP_MICROSERVICE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:3111' }; if (-not $env:TELEGRAM_MICROSERVICE_URL) { $env:TELEGRAM_MICROSERVICE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:3112' }; if (-not $env:SHOPEE_MICROSERVICE_URL) { $env:SHOPEE_MICROSERVICE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:3113' }; if (-not $env:MELI_RPA_URL) { $env:MELI_RPA_URL='http://127.0.0.1:3114' }; if (-not $env:AMAZON_MICROSERVICE_URL) { $env:AMAZON_MICROSERVICE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:3117' }; npm --prefix services/api run dev"
scripts.svc:all:build: npm run svc:wa:build && npm run svc:tg:build && npm run svc:shopee:build && npm run svc:meli:build && npm run svc:amazon:build
scripts.svc:all:start: npm run svc:wa:start & npm run svc:tg:start & npm run svc:shopee:start & npm run svc:meli:start & npm run svc:amazon:start & npm run svc:ops:start
scripts.prod:build: npm run build && npm run svc:all:build
scripts.pm2:bootstrap: npm run prod:build && npm run pm2:start && npm run pm2:save
